repositoryAllowed: approved build Git SHA and QA bundle identity
approved build identity match including source provenance and executable fingerprints
approved build active generation and random non-derived approval ID
path-free Provider Free profile fingerprint and native cleanup completion status
Product fixture labels, dimensions, licenses, and hashes
participant codes without an identity mapping
eligibility and cohort buckets without raw answers
aggregate task metrics with counts and denominators
de-identified finding IDs and paraphrased evidence
separate de-identified recruitment exception approvals and decision references
versioned facilitator instrument, including approved hint and takeover text
retention completion status without storage metadata
privateOnly: participant name and contact or scheduling details
participant code mapping to identity
session date, start time, time zone, delivery mode, and private meeting reference
facilitator, observer, technical operator, and accommodation setup assignments
accessibility support owner assignments and handoff status
study owner and observer names
approved storage path or internal storage reference
private approved-build record and active-ledger paths, approval date, decision references, ledger history, protected Keychain anchor payload, and mid-study change reason
raw Provider Free WebKit data-store identifier, boot nonce, cleanup nonce, lifecycle evidence paths, and macOS Keychain consumption markers
canonical preserved app path and private per-session launch binding
consent answers tied to a person
raw screener answers
accommodation or medical details
recordings, screens, audio, and raw notes
raw or potentially identifying quotes
intervention and session logs with identifying timestamps or paths
participant-linked delivered facilitator interventions, including IDs, exact delivered text, assist ordinals, timestamps, and deviation logs
retention and deletion ledger
private authorization/retention log references
access-control evidence and exceptions
